channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Officials Raised Concerns Over Proposed Lease of Rock Creek Park to Private Operator
item.description: Internal emails obtained from the National Park Service reveal that officials raised repeated concerns about the Trump administration's plan to lease nearly 40 acres of Rock Creek Park in Washington, ...

item.title: President Wadagni forms 24-member loyalist cabinet in Benin after inauguration
item.description: Benin has entered a new political phase following the inauguration of President Romuald Wadagni, who succeeded former leader Patrice Talon. Just hours after being sworn in on 24 May 2026, Wadagni quic...

item.title: Cockroach Janta Party founder to return to India on June 6 to stage protest demanding Education Minister’s resignation
item.description: Abhijeet Dipke, the founder of the satirical political campaign Cockroach Janta Party, has announced that he will return to India from the United States on June 6 to organise a peaceful protest in Del...

item.title: Zanzibar Opposition Challenges Mandatory National Service for Local Youth
item.description: Zanzibar – ACT Wazalendo, opposition party, imeanza kupinga vikali agizo jipya la serikali linalotaka wanafunzi wa shule za juu Zanzibar kujiunga na Jeshi la Kujenga Taifa (JKT) kwa lazima. Kwa mujibu...

item.title: EACOP Pipeline Construction in Tanzania Surpasses 81% with Increased Youth Employment Opportunities
item.description: The construction of the East African Crude Oil Pipeline (EACOP), one of the major energy infrastructure projects in the region, has now reached over 81 per cent completion. This update was shared by t...

item.title: Senate Republicans Express Concern That Trump's Actions Could Complicate GOP Midterm Prospects
item.description: According to reporting discussed on CNN and cited by Raw Story, some Republican senators are becoming increasingly frustrated with President Donald Trump as the 2026 midterm elections approach. Congre...

item.title: David Osiany visits and supports Narok family after Utumishi Girls fire tragedy claims 15-year-old student
item.description: Former Trade Chief Administrative Secretary David Osiany has drawn public attention after making a personal visit to Narok to comfort a family devastated by the Utumishi Girls’ Academy fire tragedy in...

item.title: Trump and Speaker Johnson Meet Over Controversial $1.7B Compensation Fund Affecting GOP Legislation
item.description: President Donald Trump is scheduled to meet with House Speaker Mike Johnson at the White House to discuss the $1.7 billion taxpayer-funded 'anti-weaponization fund,' which Trump created to provide com...

item.title: 537 Pass Environmental Planners Licensure Exam in May 2026
item.description: The Professional Regulation Commission (PRC) officially announced on June 1, 2026, that a total of 537 out of 555 examinees successfully passed the Environmental Planners Computer-Based Licensure Exam...

item.title: Mystery Jets to tour UK and Ireland in late 2026 alongside upcoming seventh album release
item.description: Mystery Jets have announced a new UK and Ireland tour scheduled for November 2026, coinciding with the release of their forthcoming seventh studio album, ‘A Hole To See The Sky Through’. The tour will...

item.title: Iran suspends US talks amid regional escalation and online backlash over diplomatic handling
item.description: Iran announced it is suspending negotiations with the United States following a period of heightened regional tensions involving Israeli strikes and an expanded military offensive in Lebanon. Accordin...

item.title: ‘Minecraft’ Sequel ‘Squared’ Set to Expand the Game’s World and Characters
item.description: The sequel to the 2025 hit film A Minecraft Movie has been officially titled A Minecraft Movie Squared and is scheduled for release on 23rd July 2027. A new behind-the-scenes clip has introduced Kirst...

item.title: Ottawa Staff Recommend Levy and Facility Sales to Fund Infrastructure Repairs
item.description: Ottawa city staff have proposed a plan to tackle the city's aging infrastructure, which includes introducing a new levy and potentially selling older city-owned facilities. The initiative aims to gene...

item.title: Data Shows Low Public Support for Trump's Plans to Name Buildings After Himself
item.description: President Donald Trump's recent focus on naming government buildings after himself and other high-profile projects has met with overwhelming public disapproval, according to recent data analyzed by CN...

item.title: Democratic Leaders Debate Which States Should Lead the 2028 Presidential Primary
item.description: Democratic Party leaders from multiple states gathered in Washington, D.C., in late May 2026 to advocate for their states to hold the first presidential primary for the 2028 election. The debate cente...

item.title: PMD Forecasts Rain, Thunderstorms, and Possible Landslides in Northern Pakistan from June 2-5
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued a forecast for dust-thunderstorms and rainfall in various regions of Pakistan from June 2 to June 5, influenced by a westerly wave approaching t...

item.title: French Open player Adolfo Daniel Vallejo fined €65,000 over remarks about female umpire
item.description: Paraguayan tennis player Adolfo Daniel Vallejo has been fined €65,000 (£56,000) by French Open organisers following comments he made after his second-round defeat. Vallejo was sanctioned after suggest...

item.title: Saronic Introduces Marauder: A Rapidly Built Autonomous Surface Vessel for Dual-Use Operations
item.description: Texas-based company Saronic has unveiled the Marauder Medium Unmanned Surface Vessel (MUSV), a fully autonomous or remotely supervised ship designed for both defense and commercial operations. Remarka...

item.title: Jinggoy Estrada declines Senate custody and orders salary suspension amid plunder allegations
item.description: Sen. Jinggoy Estrada has issued a public statement ahead of his surrender to authorities, saying he will not seek protective custody from the Senate in connection with the non-bailable plunder case fi...

item.title: NCCIA asks Supreme Court to withdraw order requiring quick decision on Imaan Mazari and Hadi Chattha sentence suspension pleas
item.description: The National Cyber Crime Investigation Agency (NCCIA) has approached the Supreme Court seeking withdrawal of its May 12 order that directed the Islamabad High Court (IHC) to decide within two weeks th...
